motivations.name: One Step
motivations.content: You don't have to see the whole staircase. Just take the next step. That's it. One step is enough for now.

motivations.name: Still Here
motivations.content: The fact that you're still trying means you haven't given up. That's not nothing — that's everything.

motivations.name: Small Wins
motivations.content: Big things are made of tiny moments. That small thing you did today? It counts more than you know.

motivations.name: Roots Before Wings
motivations.content: Every great thing starts quietly, underground, where no one can see it growing. Trust the process — your roots are deepening.

motivations.name: You're Enough
motivations.content: Not more productive. Not more polished. Not someone else. You, exactly as you are right now, are enough to start.

motivations.name: Brick by Brick
motivations.content: Every wall was built one brick at a time by someone who didn't quit. You're building something too. Keep laying bricks.
